name: Dark Evolving Pad
notes: Illustrative starting point (suffixed Pct), not captured factory values. Ranges follow FLEX guidance: dark pads sit around 30-40% cutoff with long attack/release; automate a brightness macro over 4-8 bars for slow evolution.

name: FM Sub Bass
notes: Illustrative FM bass patch. A near-sine carrier with light operator modulation gives a rounded sub; keep operator frequency in Ratio mode for a tuned, harmonic result. Values are illustrative, not factory captures.

name: Vocal Clarity Starting Curve
notes: Illustrative EQ starting curve using the 7-band functional model (HP foundation, low-mid de-mud, presence, air). Bandwidth is inverted (lower % = wider). Always EQ by ear against the source; frequencies are approximate.
